top_signals.title: BPCL Turns to Spot Crude as Iran Conflict Disrupts Term Supplies
top_signals.summary: India’s Bharat Petroleum Corp. Ltd. has largely shifted to making spot crude purchases as the Iran war upends annual arrangements for Middle Eastern barrels, highlighting challenges for refiners to secure supplies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump says he was 'an hour away' from Iran strike decision before he postponed it
top_signals.summary: Asked how long Iran has to come to the table, Trump said it could be two or three days, or perhaps until Sunday or early next week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: High Value Council Tax Surcharge
top_signals.summary: We are seeking views on the design and delivery of the High Value Council Tax Surcharge (HVCTS), a new charge on residential properties worth £2 million and above in England.
